title: Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs

seo.title: Korean BBQ Short Ribs (Galbi) Recipe - Easy & Authentic
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best Korean BBQ Short Ribs (Galbi) at home with our easy, authentic recipe. Juicy, tender, and full of flavor. Perfect for dinner!
longTailKeywords: how to make Korean BBQ short ribs
seo.h1: Authentic Korean BBQ Short Ribs (Galbi) Recipe
h2Headings: What is Galbi (Korean BBQ Short Ribs)?
Ingredients for Delicious Korean BBQ Short Ribs
Pro Tips for Perfect Korean BBQ Short Ribs
seo.imageAlt: A plate of perfectly grilled Korean BBQ Short Ribs (Galbi) garnished with sesame seeds and green onions.
seo.imageCaption: Savor the rich, savory flavors of homemade Korean BBQ Short Ribs, a classic Galbi recipe that's easier than you think!

description: Galbi, or Korean BBQ Short Ribs, is a beloved dish featuring thinly sliced beef short ribs marinated in a savory-sweet soy sauce mixture. Grilled to perfection, these tender, flavorful ribs offer a delightful caramelized crust and juicy interior. It is a quintessential Korean meal, perfect for sharing and enjoying with friends and family.

instructions.title: Prepare the Short Ribs
instructions.text: Rinse the flanken-cut short ribs under cold water to remove any bone fragments. Pat them thoroughly dry with paper towels. If desired, make a few shallow slits into the meat (not through the bone) to help the marinade penetrate deeper.

instructions.title: Make the Marinade Base
instructions.text: In a blender or food processor, combine the grated Asian pear, grated yellow onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger. Blend until a smooth puree is formed. This step is crucial for tenderizing the meat and infusing flavor.

instructions.title: Mix the Galbi Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, brown sugar, mirin, sesame oil, and black pepper. Add the blended pear and onion mixture to this bowl and mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined and the sugar has dissolved. This creates the signature savory-sweet Galbi flavor.

instructions.title: Marinate the Short Ribs
instructions.text: Place the prepared short ribs into the marinade, ensuring each piece is fully coated. You can use a large bowl or a resealable plastic bag. Cover the bowl or seal the bag and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight (up to 24 hours) for the best flavor and tenderness.

instructions.title: Preheat Grill or Pan
instructions.text: When ready to cook, remove the ribs from the refrigerator at least 30 minutes before grilling to bring them closer to room temperature. Preheat your outdoor grill to medium-high heat, or heat a large cast-iron skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat. Lightly oil the grates or pan to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Grill the Galbi
instructions.text: Place the marinated short ribs on the hot grill or pan. Cook for 2-4 minutes per side, depending on thickness and desired doneness. The ribs should have beautiful char marks and be cooked through but still juicy. Be careful not to overcrowd the grill or pan, cooking in batches if necessary.

instructions.title: Serve and Garnish
instructions.text: Once cooked, transfer the Galbi to a serving platter. Garnish generously with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions. Serve immediately with a side of steamed rice, kimchi, and other banchan (Korean side dishes) for a complete and authentic Korean BBQ experience.

tips: For extra tender ribs, ensure you use an Asian pear in the marinade; its enzymes naturally break down tough meat fibers.
Do not overcrowd your grill or pan. Cooking in batches allows the ribs to sear properly and develop a delicious caramelized crust instead of steaming.
Leftover Galbi can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days. Reheat gently on a pan or microwave.
article: Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs is a beloved Korean Dinner Recipes dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
